class.name: RecordReliablePdu
class.comment: FastDIS local patch: restore the missing DIS 7 Record-R PDU class so generation can treat standard row 63 as schema-backed. Evidence: upstream OpenDIS source-generator XML defines RecordRPdu/RecordReliablePdu with requestID, requiredReliabilityService, pad1, RecordREventType, numberOfRecordSets, and trailing record specifications.

attribute.name: requestID
attribute.comment: request ID provides a unique identifier

attribute.name: requiredReliabilityService
attribute.comment: level of reliability service used for this transaction

attribute.name: numberOfRecordSets
attribute.comment: Number of record sets in list
